SEO_TITLE: Andres Villarreal - Full-Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Full-Stack Developer with expertise in .NET, ASP.NET MVC, Web APIs, React, and cloud solutions.

PROFILE.description: {years}+ years building scalable full-stack apps with .NET, Java Spring Boot and React — code that holds up under real traffic. I also have hands-on experience in electronics, equally at home in a terminal or with a soldering iron. Fluent in English, French and Spanish.

EXPERIENCE.title: Full-Stack Engineer
EXPERIENCE.description: Promoted to lead end-to-end development of a custom enterprise ERP system built from scratch.
EXPERIENCE.list: Java · Spring Boot · React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
EXPERIENCE.modalDescription: Promoted from IT Electronic Specialist to focus on the full-cycle development of a proprietary ERP platform built from the ground up to streamline and centralize core business operations. The system covers inventory management, employee management, order processing, returns handling, purchase orders, and warehouse operations. This role involves end-to-end ownership — from system architecture and database design to UI/UX implementation and business logic — working closely with stakeholders across departments.
highlights: Promoted from Electronic Specialist after demonstrating strong technical ownership
Architecting a full ERP platform covering inventory, orders, returns and warehouse ops
End-to-end ownership: system design, DB schema, backend APIs and React frontend
Working directly with stakeholders to deliver a production-ready scalable solution

EXPERIENCE.title: Electronics Specialist
EXPERIENCE.description: Diagnostics, repair and hardware-software integration for mission-critical rugged devices.
EXPERIENCE.modalDescription: Specialized in keeping mission-critical rugged hardware running at peak performance. Handled end-to-end diagnostics, repair, and hardware-software integration — including embedded applications and external device compatibility for Panasonic Toughbooks, Dell, and Getac platforms. Leveraged DevOps principles in Linux environments to streamline deployments, enforce configuration consistency, and build more resilient systems.
highlights: End-to-end diagnostics and repair for Panasonic, Dell and Getac rugged platforms
Hardware-software integration including embedded apps and external device compatibility
Applied DevOps practices in Linux environments to streamline deployments
Promoted to Full-Stack Engineer role based on performance

EXPERIENCE.title: Junior Web Developer
EXPERIENCE.description: Full-Stack web development for startups to enterprises based in Colombia.
EXPERIENCE.modalDescription: Full-Stack web development for startups and enterprises based in Colombia. Focused on custom applications, eCommerce platforms, REST APIs and cloud solutions — working across the full stack from frontend to deployment.
highlights: Delivered custom apps and eCommerce sites for Colombian startups and enterprises
Built and maintained REST APIs and cloud-hosted solutions
Worked across the full stack from UI to server and deployment

EDUCATION.title: Computer Programming & Analysis
EDUCATION.description: Developed expertise in creating mobile applications, analyzing big data, and designing interactive multimedia solutions.

ABOUT.tagline: I turn ideas into clean, functional, and engaging digital experiences.
ABOUT.p1: I'm a developer who enjoys building things that don't just work — but feel intuitive and enjoyable to use. With {years}+ years of experience, I've shipped real-world projects ranging from business platforms to interactive web apps — code that holds up under real traffic, not just in demos.
ABOUT.p2: My journey started with curiosity and quickly evolved into creating solutions that improve how people connect with products and services. I'm especially drawn to clean interfaces, solid backend systems, and the kind of work where attention to detail actually matters.
ABOUT.p3: Outside of code, I enjoy understanding how things work — refining systems, optimizing workflows, or bringing old laptops back to life. I also bring a creative side shaped by my background in cooking, where presentation and precision matter just as much as the result.
ABOUT.focus: Always looking to grow, build meaningful projects, and collaborate with people who care about quality.

interestItems: 📚 Reading whenever I get the time

PROJECTS.title: NBD Landscaping
PROJECTS.subtitle: Business app with ASP.NET MVC and C#
PROJECTS.description: Role-based web app for a landscaping business — manage clients, assign projects, and generate bids with material and labor costs.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: NBD Landscaping is a full-featured business management application built for a landscaping company. The system implements role-based authentication so each employee only sees and manages what they're authorized to. Managers can oversee all clients and projects, while field employees handle their assigned work. The bid system calculates total project costs by combining material quantities and labor hours, giving the business accurate estimates before committing to a job.

PROJECTS.title: Cities API
PROJECTS.subtitle: ASP.NET Core Web API
PROJECTS.description: REST API that maps cities to their provinces, with full CRUD support on every entity.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: Cities API is a RESTful web service built with ASP.NET Core that exposes endpoints for querying cities and their corresponding provinces. It supports full CRUD operations on both entities, follows REST conventions, and includes proper HTTP status codes and error handling. The project demonstrates clean API design patterns and serves as a practical example of building data-driven services with .NET.

PROJECTS.title: Spotify Clone
PROJECTS.subtitle: Built with Astro
PROJECTS.description: Functional Spotify clone — play songs and browse albums with a clean, responsive UI.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: A Spotify-inspired music player built with Astro and vanilla JavaScript. Users can browse a curated library of albums, play tracks with a persistent bottom player, and navigate between different album views. The project focuses on smooth UI interactions, audio state management across page navigations, and replicating the feel of a real streaming app without a backend.

PROJECTS.title: Emma's Small Engines
PROJECTS.subtitle: Business app with vanilla HTML5, CSS3 & JavaScript
PROJECTS.description: Inventory and repair management system for a small engine shop — track equipment, orders, and service records.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: Emma's Small Engines is a business management tool built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks. It handles the day-to-day operations of a small engine repair shop: tracking inventory levels, logging equipment details, managing repair orders, and keeping service history. The project demonstrates that clean, functional business software doesn't always require a heavy stack.

PROJECTS.title: VitGreen
PROJECTS.subtitle: eCommerce Website
PROJECTS.description: Modern eCommerce store for protein products — secure checkout, product reviews, and fast shipping.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: VitGreen is a modern eCommerce platform specializing in protein and health products. The site features a clean product catalog with detailed descriptions, a customer review system, and a streamlined checkout flow with secure payment integration. The design prioritizes conversion — clear CTAs, fast load times, and a mobile-first layout that makes browsing and buying easy on any device.

PROJECTS.title: V12 Magazine
PROJECTS.subtitle: Car Magazine
PROJECTS.description: Automotive magazine site covering news and events from the Colombian car scene.
PROJECTS.detailDescription: V12 Magazine is a digital automotive publication covering the Colombian car culture — from local racing events and car shows to industry news and vehicle reviews. The site was built to handle a content-heavy layout with fast load times, a clean reading experience, and easy navigation between categories. It served as a real publication used by the Colombian automotive community.
